test.query: SELECT entropy(SearchEngineID) FROM hits_10m_single settings max_threads = 1
SELECT entropy(URL) FROM (SELECT URL FROM hits_10m_single LIMIT 5000000)
SELECT entropy(URLHash) FROM (SELECT URLHash FROM hits_10m_single LIMIT 5000000)
SELECT entropy(URL, URLHash) FROM (SELECT URL, URLHash FROM hits_10m_single LIMIT 5000000)
SELECT entropy(RegionID) FROM hits_10m_single settings max_threads = 1
